headline: Financial Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Again. Here's Why.
summary: Financial companies have cozied up to such groups as chips and pharmaceuticals on Investor's Business Daily's IBD 50 list as traders rotate into more defensive stocks amid a toppling of artificial intelligence names.  IBD 50 financial names Remitly Global, Wisdom Tree and Willis Lease Finance have formed bases.  Meanwhile, Enova International triggered a special hold rule after an explosive breakout.
